titles.title: Check Yourself in the Mirror of the World

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's so easy to say that Your walking in truth today But are you really reflecting The image of Christ, I see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now check yourself In the mirror of the Word And be sure that your walk is true Ask the Savior to help you And to make Himself a part of you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes, it's so easy to say That your walking in truth today But are you really reflecting The image of Christ, I see

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And now check yourself In the mirror of the Word And be sure that your walk And your talk is true Ask the Savior to help you And to make Himself a part of you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For we all must be ready To meet Him when He come And to hear Him say come up hither To that place prepared for you

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And now check yourself In the mirror of the Word And be sure that your walk And your talk is true If not, ask the Savior to help you And to make Himself a part of you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I check myself in the mirror of the Word I'll be sure if my walk and my talk is true Savior won't you please help me And please make Yourself a part of me

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Ask the Savior to help you And to make Himself a part of you
